targetTranslation: that (pointing to something far away, referring to ءَايٰتُ/verses)
ayahArabic: طسٓ تِلْكَ ءَايٰتُ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Ṭā, Seen. These are the verses of the Qur’ān [i.e., recitation] and a clear Book

ayahArabic: طسٓ تِلْكَ ءَايٰتُ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Ṭā, Seen. These are the verses of the Qur’ān [i.e., recitation] and a clear Book

ayahArabic: هُدًى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: As guidance and good tidings for the believers

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who establish prayer and give zakāh, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who establish prayer and give zakāh, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who establish prayer and give zakāh, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who establish prayer and give zakāh, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly.

targetTranslation: they believe (referring to those who don't believe in the Hereafter)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly.

ayahEnglish: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly.

targetTranslation: they wander blindly (referring to those who don't believe in the Hereafter)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly.

targetTranslation: those (pointing to people far away who are mentioned in the next ayah)
ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُوٓءُ ٱلْعَذَابِ وَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those are the ones for whom there will be the worst of punishment, and in the Hereafter they are the greatest losers.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُوٓءُ ٱلْعَذَابِ وَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those are the ones for whom there will be the worst of punishment, and in the Hereafter they are the greatest losers.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُوٓءُ ٱلْعَذَابِ وَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those are the ones for whom there will be the worst of punishment, and in the Hereafter they are the greatest losers.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُوٓءُ ٱلْعَذَابِ وَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those are the ones for whom there will be the worst of punishment, and in the Hereafter they are the greatest losers.
distractors: will surely pay them in full

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, [O Muḥammad], you receive the Qur’ān from one Wise and Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, [O Muḥammad], you receive the Qur’ān from one Wise and Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, [O Muḥammad], you receive the Qur’ān from one Wise and Knowing.

targetTranslation: when (referring to the time when موسى said)
ayahArabic: إِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهْلِهِۦٓ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوْ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابٍ قَبَسٍ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَصْطَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Mention] when Moses said to his family, "Indeed, I have perceived a fire. I will bring you from there information or will bring you a burning torch that you may warm yourselves."

ayahArabic: إِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهْلِهِۦٓ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوْ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابٍ قَبَسٍ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَصْطَلُونَ

targetTranslation: came to her (the fire mentioned in النَّارِ)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهَا نُودِىَ أَنۢ بُورِكَ مَن فِى ٱلنَّارِ وَمَنْ حَوْلَهَا وَسُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: But when he came to it, he was called, "Blessed is whoever is at the fire and whoever is around it. And exalted is Allāh, Lord of the worlds.

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهَا نُودِىَ أَنۢ بُورِكَ مَن فِى ٱلنَّارِ وَمَنْ حَوْلَهَا وَسُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: But when he came to it, he was called, "Blessed is whoever is at the fire and whoever is around it. And exalted is Allāh, Lord of the worlds.

ayahEnglish: But when he came to it, he was called, "Blessed is whoever is at the fire and whoever is around it. And exalted is Allāh, Lord of the worlds.

ayahArabic: يٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: O Moses, indeed it is I - Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Wise."

ayahArabic: يٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: O Moses, indeed it is I - Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Wise."

ayahArabic: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّى لَا يَخَافُ لَدَىَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allāh said], "O Moses, fear not. Indeed, in My presence the messengers do not fear.

targetTranslation: he saw her/it (referring to the staff/عَصَا)

ayahArabic: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّى لَا يَخَافُ لَدَىَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allāh said], "O Moses, fear not. Indeed, in My presence the messengers do not fear.

ayahArabic: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّى لَا يَخَافُ لَدَىَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allāh said], "O Moses, fear not. Indeed, in My presence the messengers do not fear.

ayahArabic: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّى لَا يَخَافُ لَدَىَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allāh said], "O Moses, fear not. Indeed, in My presence the messengers do not fear.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسْنًۢا بَعْدَ سُوٓءٍ فَإِنِّى غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful.

targetTranslation: he wronged (subject of بَدَّلَ - he changed)
ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسْنًۢا بَعْدَ سُوٓءٍ فَإِنِّى غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسْنًۢا بَعْدَ سُوٓءٍ فَإِنِّى غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful.

targetTranslation: good conduct (referring to replacing bad deeds with good ones)

ayahEnglish: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahEnglish: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful.

targetTranslation: Most Forgiving (as a name of Allah)

ayahEnglish: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَأَدْخِلْ يَدَكَ فِى جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ فِى تِسْعِ ءَايٰتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And put your hand into the opening of your garment [at the breast]; it will come out white without disease. [These are] among the nine signs [you will take] to Pharaoh and his people. Indeed, they have been a people defiantly disobedient."

ayahArabic: وَأَدْخِلْ يَدَكَ فِى جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ فِى تِسْعِ ءَايٰتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And put your hand into the opening of your garment [at the breast]; it will come out white without disease. [These are] among the nine signs [you will take] to Pharaoh and his people. Indeed, they have been a people defiantly disobedient."

targetTranslation: any harm (being acted upon by مِنْ غَيْرِ - without)
ayahArabic: وَأَدْخِلْ يَدَكَ فِى جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ فِى تِسْعِ ءَايٰتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فٰسِقِينَ

targetTranslation: of nine (part of تِسْعِ ءَايٰتٍ - nine signs)

ayahEnglish: And put your hand into the opening of your garment [at the breast]; it will come out white without disease. [These are] among the nine signs [you will take] to Pharaoh and his people. Indeed, they have been a people defiantly disobedient."

ayahArabic: وَأَدْخِلْ يَدَكَ فِى جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ فِى تِسْعِ ءَايٰتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And put your hand into the opening of your garment [at the breast]; it will come out white without disease. [These are] among the nine signs [you will take] to Pharaoh and his people. Indeed, they have been a people defiantly disobedient."

targetTranslation: it came to them (referring to آيَاتُنَا/Our signs)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic."

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic."

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic."

targetTranslation: they said (subject of هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ - 'this is clear magic')
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic."

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic."

targetTranslation: one who makes very clear (describing سِحْرٌ/magic)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic."

ayahArabic: وَجَحَدُوا۟ بِهَا وَٱسْتَيْقَنَتْهَآ أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they rejected them, while their [inner] selves were convinced thereof, out of injustice and haughtiness. So see how was the end of the corrupters.

ayahArabic: وَجَحَدُوا۟ بِهَا وَٱسْتَيْقَنَتْهَآ أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they rejected them, while their [inner] selves were convinced thereof, out of injustice and haughtiness. So see how was the end of the corrupters.

ayahArabic: وَجَحَدُوا۟ بِهَا وَٱسْتَيْقَنَتْهَآ أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they rejected them, while their [inner] selves were convinced thereof, out of injustice and haughtiness. So see how was the end of the corrupters.

ayahArabic: وَجَحَدُوا۟ بِهَا وَٱسْتَيْقَنَتْهَآ أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they rejected them, while their [inner] selves were convinced thereof, out of injustice and haughtiness. So see how was the end of the corrupters.

ayahArabic: وَجَحَدُوا۟ بِهَا وَٱسْتَيْقَنَتْهَآ أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they rejected them, while their [inner] selves were convinced thereof, out of injustice and haughtiness. So see how was the end of the corrupters.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمٰنَ عِلْمًا وَقَالَا ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly given to David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, "Praise [is due] to Allāh, who has favored us over many of His believing servants."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمٰنَ عِلْمًا وَقَالَا ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly given to David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, "Praise [is due] to Allāh, who has favored us over many of His believing servants."

targetTranslation: knowledge (as the object being given to داود وسليمان)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمٰنَ عِلْمًا وَقَالَا ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

targetTranslation: The one who (refers to Allah who favored them)

ayahEnglish: And We had certainly given to David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, "Praise [is due] to Allāh, who has favored us over many of His believing servants."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمٰنَ عِلْمًا وَقَالَا ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly given to David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, "Praise [is due] to Allāh, who has favored us over many of His believing servants."

ayahArabic: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيْمٰنُ دَاوُۥدَ وَقَالَ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ عُلِّمْنَا مَنطِقَ ٱلطَّيْرِ وَأُوتِينَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ إِنَّ هٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahEnglish: And Solomon inherited David. He said, "O people, we have been taught the language of birds, and we have been given from all things. Indeed, this is evident bounty."

ayahArabic: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيْمٰنُ دَاوُۥدَ وَقَالَ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ عُلِّمْنَا مَنطِقَ ٱلطَّيْرِ وَأُوتِينَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ إِنَّ هٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahEnglish: And Solomon inherited David. He said, "O people, we have been taught the language of birds, and we have been given from all things. Indeed, this is evident bounty."

distractors: (would be) a responder to a cry

ayahEnglish: And Solomon inherited David. He said, "O people, we have been taught the language of birds, and we have been given from all things. Indeed, this is evident bounty."

ayahArabic: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيْمٰنَ جُنُودُهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ وَٱلطَّيْرِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And gathered for Solomon were his soldiers of the jinn and men and birds, and they were [marching] in rows

targetTranslation: they are being arranged/kept in order (referring to سُلَيْمٰنَ جُنُودُهُ - Solomon's forces)
ayahArabic: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيْمٰنَ جُنُودُهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ وَٱلطَّيْرِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And gathered for Solomon were his soldiers of the jinn and men and birds, and they were [marching] in rows

targetTranslation: when (used for future or conditional events)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ وَادِ ٱلنَّمْلِ قَالَتْ نَمْلَةٌ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّمْلُ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ مَسٰكِنَكُمْ لَا يَحْطِمَنَّكُمْ سُلَيْمٰنُ وَجُنُودُهُۥ وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they came upon the valley of the ants, an ant said, "O ants, enter your dwellings that you not be crushed by Solomon and his soldiers while they perceive not."

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ وَادِ ٱلنَّمْلِ قَالَتْ نَمْلَةٌ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّمْلُ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ مَسٰكِنَكُمْ لَا يَحْطِمَنَّكُمْ سُلَيْمٰنُ وَجُنُودُهُۥ وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ

ayahEnglish: Until, when they came upon the valley of the ants, an ant said, "O ants, enter your dwellings that you not be crushed by Solomon and his soldiers while they perceive not."

ayahArabic: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صٰلِحًا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants."

ayahArabic: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صٰلِحًا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants."

ayahEnglish: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants."

targetTranslation: a righteous deed (object of أَعْمَلَ - I may do)
ayahArabic: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صٰلِحًا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants."

ayahArabic: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صٰلِحًا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants."

ayahArabic: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صٰلِحًا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants."

ayahArabic: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِىَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَآئِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And he took attendance of the birds and said, "Why do I not see the hoopoe - or is he among the absent?

ayahArabic: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِىَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَآئِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And he took attendance of the birds and said, "Why do I not see the hoopoe - or is he among the absent?

ayahArabic: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِىَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَآئِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And he took attendance of the birds and said, "Why do I not see the hoopoe - or is he among the absent?

ayahArabic: لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُۥ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لَأَا۟ذْبَحَنَّهُۥٓ أَوْ لَيَأْتِيَنِّى بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: I will surely punish him with a severe punishment or slaughter him unless he brings me clear authorization."

ayahArabic: لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُۥ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لَأَا۟ذْبَحَنَّهُۥٓ أَوْ لَيَأْتِيَنِّى بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: I will surely punish him with a severe punishment or slaughter him unless he brings me clear authorization."

ayahArabic: لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُۥ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لَأَا۟ذْبَحَنَّهُۥٓ أَوْ لَيَأْتِيَنِّى بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: I will surely punish him with a severe punishment or slaughter him unless he brings me clear authorization."

ayahArabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But he [i.e., the hoopoe] stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news.

targetTranslation: far/distant (describing غَيْرَ, showing it follows another word)
ayahArabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But he [i.e., the hoopoe] stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news.

ayahArabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But he [i.e., the hoopoe] stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news.

ayahArabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But he [i.e., the hoopoe] stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news.

ayahArabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But he [i.e., the hoopoe] stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news.

ayahArabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But he [i.e., the hoopoe] stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news.

ayahArabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.

targetTranslation: a woman (object of وَجَدتُّ - I found)
ayahArabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.

targetTranslation: she rules them (referring to her people)
ayahArabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.

ayahArabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.

ayahArabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.

ayahArabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.

ayahArabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.

ayahArabic: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allāh, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,

ayahArabic: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allāh, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,

ayahArabic: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allāh, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,

ayahArabic: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allāh, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,

targetTranslation: their deeds (referring to the people who were prostrating to the sun)
ayahArabic: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allāh, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,

ayahArabic: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allāh, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,

targetTranslation: they prostrate (after أَلَّا meaning 'that they do not')
ayahArabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allāh, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare -

targetTranslation: the one who (describes what comes after يَسْجُدُوا۟)
ayahArabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allāh, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare -

targetTranslation: he brings forth/makes (something) come out (subject of يَسْجُدُوا)
ayahArabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allāh, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare -

targetTranslation: that which (connects to تُخْفُونَ - you conceal)
ayahArabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allāh, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare -

targetTranslation: you (plural) hide (what you hide is mentioned in context)
ayahArabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allāh, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare -

ayahArabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allāh, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare -

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Allāh - there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Great Throne."

targetTranslation: deity/god (object of لا meaning 'there is no')
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Allāh - there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Great Throne."

targetTranslation: He (refers to Allah in this ayah)
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Allāh - there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Great Throne."

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Allāh - there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Great Throne."

ayahArabic: قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Solomon] said, "We will see whether you were truthful or were of the liars.

targetTranslation: did you tell the truth? (asking about the message from هُدْهُد)
ayahArabic: قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Solomon] said, "We will see whether you were truthful or were of the liars.

targetTranslation: you were (subject of سَنَنظُرُ - we will see)
ayahArabic: قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰذِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Solomon] said, "We will see whether you were truthful or were of the liars.

ayahArabic: ٱذْهَب بِّكِتٰبِى هٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then leave them and see what [answer] they will return."

ayahArabic: ٱذْهَب بِّكِتٰبِى هٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then leave them and see what [answer] they will return."

targetTranslation: what? (asking about the response to فَأَلْقِهْ)
ayahArabic: ٱذْهَب بِّكِتٰبِى هٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then leave them and see what [answer] they will return."

ayahArabic: ٱذْهَب بِّكِتٰبِى هٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then leave them and see what [answer] they will return."

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ إِنِّىٓ أُلْقِىَ إِلَىَّ كِتٰبٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: She said, "O eminent ones, indeed, to me has been delivered a noble letter.

targetTranslation: it was thrown/delivered (to إِلَىَّ - to me)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ إِنِّىٓ أُلْقِىَ إِلَىَّ كِتٰبٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: She said, "O eminent ones, indeed, to me has been delivered a noble letter.

targetTranslation: a noble book (subject of أُلْقِىَ - was sent)

ayahEnglish: She said, "O eminent ones, indeed, to me has been delivered a noble letter.

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ إِنِّىٓ أُلْقِىَ إِلَىَّ كِتٰبٌ كَرِيمٌ

ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ مِن سُلَيْمٰنَ وَإِنَّهُۥ بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is from Solomon, and indeed, it is [i.e., reads]: 'In the name of Allāh, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,

ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ مِن سُلَيْمٰنَ وَإِنَّهُۥ بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is from Solomon, and indeed, it is [i.e., reads]: 'In the name of Allāh, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,

targetTranslation: do not rise in arrogance (against me) (connected to أَلَّا)
ayahArabic: أَلَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَىَّ وَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Be not haughty with me but come to me in submission [as Muslims].'"

ayahArabic: أَلَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَىَّ وَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Be not haughty with me but come to me in submission [as Muslims].'"

targetTranslation: she said (the Queen of Sheba speaking to المَلَؤُا - the chiefs)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَفْتُونِى فِىٓ أَمْرِى مَا كُنتُ قَاطِعَةً أَمْرًا حَتَّىٰ تَشْهَدُونِ
ayahEnglish: She said, "O eminent ones, advise me in my affair. I would not decide a matter until you witness [for] me."

targetTranslation: give me (all of you) your formal opinion

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ نَحْنُ أُو۟لُوا۟ قُوَّةٍ وَأُو۟لُوا۟ بَأْسٍ شَدِيدٍ وَٱلْأَمْرُ إِلَيْكِ فَٱنظُرِى مَاذَا تَأْمُرِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "We are men of strength and of great military might, but the command is yours, so see what you will command."

ayahArabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّ ٱلْمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُوا۟ قَرْيَةً أَفْسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوٓا۟ أَعِزَّةَ أَهْلِهَآ أَذِلَّةً وَكَذٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: She said, "Indeed kings - when they enter a city, they ruin it and render the honored of its people humbled. And thus do they do.

targetTranslation: when (introduces the condition that دَخَلُوا۟ follows)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّ ٱلْمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُوا۟ قَرْيَةً أَفْسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوٓا۟ أَعِزَّةَ أَهْلِهَآ أَذِلَّةً وَكَذٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: She said, "Indeed kings - when they enter a city, they ruin it and render the honored of its people humbled. And thus do they do.

targetTranslation: they entered (subject of أَفْسَدُوهَا - they corrupted it)

ayahEnglish: She said, "Indeed kings - when they enter a city, they ruin it and render the honored of its people humbled. And thus do they do.

targetTranslation: they do/make/act (referring to the kings mentioned earlier in the verse)
ayahArabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّ ٱلْمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُوا۟ قَرْيَةً أَفْسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوٓا۟ أَعِزَّةَ أَهْلِهَآ أَذِلَّةً وَكَذٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: She said, "Indeed kings - when they enter a city, they ruin it and render the honored of its people humbled. And thus do they do.

ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى مُرْسِلَةٌ إِلَيْهِم بِهَدِيَّةٍ فَنَاظِرَةٌۢ بِمَ يَرْجِعُ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: But indeed, I will send to them a gift and see with what [reply] the messengers will return."

ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى مُرْسِلَةٌ إِلَيْهِم بِهَدِيَّةٍ فَنَاظِرَةٌۢ بِمَ يَرْجِعُ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: But indeed, I will send to them a gift and see with what [reply] the messengers will return."

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ سُلَيْمٰنَ قَالَ أَتُمِدُّونَنِ بِمَالٍ فَمَآ ءَاتَىٰنِۦَ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ مِّمَّآ ءَاتَىٰكُم بَلْ أَنتُم بِهَدِيَّتِكُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: So when they came to Solomon, he said, "Do you provide me with wealth? But what Allāh has given me is better than what He has given you. Rather, it is you who rejoice in your gift.

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ سُلَيْمٰنَ قَالَ أَتُمِدُّونَنِ بِمَالٍ فَمَآ ءَاتَىٰنِۦَ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ مِّمَّآ ءَاتَىٰكُم بَلْ أَنتُم بِهَدِيَّتِكُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ

ayahEnglish: So when they came to Solomon, he said, "Do you provide me with wealth? But what Allāh has given me is better than what He has given you. Rather, it is you who rejoice in your gift.

targetTranslation: you all feel joy/happiness (referring to the people receiving the gift in the ayah)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ سُلَيْمٰنَ قَالَ أَتُمِدُّونَنِ بِمَالٍ فَمَآ ءَاتَىٰنِۦَ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ مِّمَّآ ءَاتَىٰكُم بَلْ أَنتُم بِهَدِيَّتِكُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: So when they came to Solomon, he said, "Do you provide me with wealth? But what Allāh has given me is better than what He has given you. Rather, it is you who rejoice in your gift.

ayahArabic: ٱرْجِعْ إِلَيْهِمْ فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّهُم بِجُنُودٍ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُم بِهَا وَلَنُخْرِجَنَّهُم مِّنْهَآ أَذِلَّةً وَهُمْ صٰغِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Return to them, for we will surely come to them with soldiers that they will be powerless to encounter, and we will surely expel them therefrom in humiliation, and they will be debased."

ayahArabic: ٱرْجِعْ إِلَيْهِمْ فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّهُم بِجُنُودٍ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُم بِهَا وَلَنُخْرِجَنَّهُم مِّنْهَآ أَذِلَّةً وَهُمْ صٰغِرُونَ

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَيُّكُمْ يَأْتِينِى بِعَرْشِهَا قَبْلَ أَن يَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Solomon] said, "O assembly [of jinn], which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in submission?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَيُّكُمْ يَأْتِينِى بِعَرْشِهَا قَبْلَ أَن يَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Solomon] said, "O assembly [of jinn], which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in submission?"

targetTranslation: he comes/arrives to me (in jussive mood)

ayahEnglish: [Solomon] said, "O assembly [of jinn], which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in submission?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ عِفْرِيتٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن تَقُومَ مِن مَّقَامِكَ وَإِنِّى عَلَيْهِ لَقَوِىٌّ أَمِينٌ
ayahEnglish: A powerful one from among the jinn said, "I will bring it to you before you rise from your place, and indeed, I am for this [task] strong and trustworthy."

targetTranslation: a powerful and cunning being (subject of قَالَ - said)
ayahArabic: قَالَ عِفْرِيتٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن تَقُومَ مِن مَّقَامِكَ وَإِنِّى عَلَيْهِ لَقَوِىٌّ أَمِينٌ
ayahEnglish: A powerful one from among the jinn said, "I will bring it to you before you rise from your place, and indeed, I am for this [task] strong and trustworthy."

targetTranslation: I (subject of ءَاتِيكَ - I will bring)

ayahEnglish: A powerful one from among the jinn said, "I will bring it to you before you rise from your place, and indeed, I am for this [task] strong and trustworthy."

targetTranslation: I bring to you (responding to سليمان's request)

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱلَّذِى عِندَهُۥ عِلْمٌ مِّنَ ٱلْكِتٰبِ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن يَرْتَدَّ إِلَيْكَ طَرْفُكَ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهُ مُسْتَقِرًّا عِندَهُۥ قَالَ هٰذَا مِن فَضْلِ رَبِّى لِيَبْلُوَنِىٓ ءَأَشْكُرُ أَمْ أَكْفُرُ وَمَن شَكَرَ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِۦ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ رَبِّى غَنِىٌّ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Said one who had knowledge from the Scripture, "I will bring it to you before your glance returns to you." And when [Solomon] saw it placed before him, he said, "This is from the favor of my Lord to test me whether I will be grateful or ungrateful. And whoever is grateful - his gratitude is only for [the benefit of] himself. And whoever is ungrateful - then indeed, my Lord is Free of need and Generous."

ayahArabic: قَالَ نَكِّرُوا۟ لَهَا عَرْشَهَا نَنظُرْ أَتَهْتَدِىٓ أَمْ تَكُونُ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Disguise for her her throne; we will see whether she will be guided [to truth] or will be of those who is not guided."

targetTranslation: she came (subject of قِيلَ - it was said)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْ قِيلَ أَهٰكَذَا عَرْشُكِ قَالَتْ كَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ وَأُوتِينَا ٱلْعِلْمَ مِن قَبْلِهَا وَكُنَّا مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: So when she arrived, it was said [to her], "Is your throne like this?" She said, "[It is] as though it was it." [Solomon said], "And we were given knowledge before her, and we have been Muslims [in submission to Allāh].

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْ قِيلَ أَهٰكَذَا عَرْشُكِ قَالَتْ كَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ وَأُوتِينَا ٱلْعِلْمَ مِن قَبْلِهَا وَكُنَّا مُسْلِمِينَ

targetTranslation: what (that which she used to worship)
ayahArabic: وَصَدَّهَا مَا كَانَت تَّعْبُدُ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِنَّهَا كَانَتْ مِن قَوْمٍ كٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And that which she was worshipping other than Allāh had averted her [from submission to Him]. Indeed, she was from a disbelieving people."

ayahEnglish: And that which she was worshipping other than Allāh had averted her [from submission to Him]. Indeed, she was from a disbelieving people."

ayahArabic: قِيلَ لَهَا ٱدْخُلِى ٱلصَّرْحَ فَلَمَّا رَأَتْهُ حَسِبَتْهُ لُجَّةً وَكَشَفَتْ عَن سَاقَيْهَا قَالَ إِنَّهُۥ صَرْحٌ مُّمَرَّدٌ مِّن قَوَارِيرَ قَالَتْ رَبِّ إِنِّى ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِى وَأَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمٰنَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: She was told, "Enter the palace." But when she saw it, she thought it was a body of water and uncovered her shins [to wade through]. He said, "Indeed, it is a palace [whose floor is] made smooth with glass." She said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, and I submit with Solomon to Allāh, Lord of the worlds."

ayahEnglish: She was told, "Enter the palace." But when she saw it, she thought it was a body of water and uncovered her shins [to wade through]. He said, "Indeed, it is a palace [whose floor is] made smooth with glass." She said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, and I submit with Solomon to Allāh, Lord of the worlds."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمْ صٰلِحًا أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَإِذَا هُمْ فَرِيقَانِ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly sent to Thamūd their brother Ṣāliḥ, [saying], "Worship Allāh," and at once they were two parties conflicting.

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ قَبْلَ ٱلْحَسَنَةِ لَوْلَا تَسْتَغْفِرُونَ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "O my people, why are you impatient for evil before [i.e., instead of] good? Why do you not seek forgiveness of Allāh that you may receive mercy?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ قَبْلَ ٱلْحَسَنَةِ لَوْلَا تَسْتَغْفِرُونَ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ

ayahEnglish: He said, "O my people, why are you impatient for evil before [i.e., instead of] good? Why do you not seek forgiveness of Allāh that you may receive mercy?"

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱطَّيَّرْنَا بِكَ وَبِمَن مَّعَكَ قَالَ طٰٓئِرُكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تُفْتَنُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "We consider you a bad omen, you and those with you." He said, "Your omen [i.e., fate] is with Allāh. Rather, you are a people being tested."

targetTranslation: we saw bad omens (in بِكَ - in you)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱطَّيَّرْنَا بِكَ وَبِمَن مَّعَكَ قَالَ طٰٓئِرُكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تُفْتَنُونَ

ayahArabic: وَكَانَ فِى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ تِسْعَةُ رَهْطٍ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And there were in the city nine family heads causing corruption in the land and not amending [its affairs].

targetTranslation: a group (of nine men, mentioned in تِسْعَةُ)
ayahArabic: وَكَانَ فِى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ تِسْعَةُ رَهْطٍ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And there were in the city nine family heads causing corruption in the land and not amending [its affairs].

targetTranslation: they corrupt (in contrast to يُصْلِحُونَ - they reform)
ayahArabic: وَكَانَ فِى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ تِسْعَةُ رَهْطٍ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And there were in the city nine family heads causing corruption in the land and not amending [its affairs].

ayahArabic: وَكَانَ فِى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ تِسْعَةُ رَهْطٍ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And there were in the city nine family heads causing corruption in the land and not amending [its affairs].

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ تَقَاسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهْلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصٰدِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Take a mutual oath by Allāh that we will kill him by night, he and his family. Then we will say to his executor, 'We did not witness the destruction of his family, and indeed, we are truthful.'"

targetTranslation: they (all) shared among themselves (subject of قَالُوا۟)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ تَقَاسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهْلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصٰدِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Take a mutual oath by Allāh that we will kill him by night, he and his family. Then we will say to his executor, 'We did not witness the destruction of his family, and indeed, we are truthful.'"

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ تَقَاسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهْلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصٰدِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Take a mutual oath by Allāh that we will kill him by night, he and his family. Then we will say to his executor, 'We did not witness the destruction of his family, and indeed, we are truthful.'"

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ تَقَاسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهْلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصٰدِقُونَ

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ تَقَاسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهْلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصٰدِقُونَ

ayahArabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they planned a plan, and We planned a plan, while they perceived not.

ayahArabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they planned a plan, and We planned a plan, while they perceived not.

targetTranslation: they sense (subject of لَا - they do not)
ayahArabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they planned a plan, and We planned a plan, while they perceived not.

ayahArabic: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمْ أَنَّا دَمَّرْنٰهُمْ وَقَوْمَهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then look how was the outcome of their plan - that We destroyed them and their people, all.

distractors: And We caused to gush forth

ayahEnglish: Then look how was the outcome of their plan - that We destroyed them and their people, all.

ayahArabic: فَتِلْكَ بُيُوتُهُمْ خَاوِيَةًۢ بِمَا ظَلَمُوٓا۟ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: So those are their houses, desolate because of the wrong they had done. Indeed in that is a sign for people who know.

targetTranslation: lying empty (describing their houses in بُيُوتُهُمْ)
ayahArabic: فَتِلْكَ بُيُوتُهُمْ خَاوِيَةًۢ بِمَا ظَلَمُوٓا۟ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْلَمُونَ

ayahArabic: وَأَنجَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ يَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We saved those who believed and used to fear Allāh.

ayahArabic: وَأَنجَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ يَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We saved those who believed and used to fear Allāh.

ayahArabic: وَأَنجَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ يَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We saved those who believed and used to fear Allāh.

ayahArabic: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلْفٰحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Lot, when he said to his people, "Do you commit immorality while you are seeing?

ayahArabic: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلْفٰحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Lot, when he said to his people, "Do you commit immorality while you are seeing?

ayahArabic: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلْفٰحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Lot, when he said to his people, "Do you commit immorality while you are seeing?

ayahArabic: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلْفٰحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Lot, when he said to his people, "Do you commit immorality while you are seeing?

targetTranslation: is it indeed you all? (subject of لَتَأْتُونَ)
ayahArabic: أَئِنَّكُمْ لَتَأْتُونَ ٱلرِّجَالَ شَهْوَةً مِّن دُونِ ٱلنِّسَآءِ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تَجْهَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do you indeed approach men with desire instead of women? Rather, you are a people behaving ignorantly."

ayahArabic: أَئِنَّكُمْ لَتَأْتُونَ ٱلرِّجَالَ شَهْوَةً مِّن دُونِ ٱلنِّسَآءِ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تَجْهَلُونَ

ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ أَخْرِجُوٓا۟ ءَالَ لُوطٍ مِّن قَرْيَتِكُمْ إِنَّهُمْ أُنَاسٌ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But the answer of his people was not except that they said, "Expel the family of Lot from your city. Indeed, they are people who keep themselves pure."

ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ أَخْرِجُوٓا۟ ءَالَ لُوطٍ مِّن قَرْيَتِكُمْ إِنَّهُمْ أُنَاسٌ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ

ayahEnglish: But the answer of his people was not except that they said, "Expel the family of Lot from your city. Indeed, they are people who keep themselves pure."

ayahArabic: فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنٰهَا مِنَ ٱلْغٰبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We saved him and his family, except for his wife; We destined her to be of those who remained behind.

ayahArabic: فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنٰهَا مِنَ ٱلْغٰبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We saved him and his family, except for his wife; We destined her to be of those who remained behind.

ayahArabic: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.

ayahArabic: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.

ayahArabic: قُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَىٰٓ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Praise be to Allāh, and peace upon His servants whom He has chosen. Is Allāh better or what they associate with Him?"

ayahArabic: قُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَىٰٓ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Praise be to Allāh, and peace upon His servants whom He has chosen. Is Allāh better or what they associate with Him?"

ayahArabic: قُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَىٰٓ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ

ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Praise be to Allāh, and peace upon His servants whom He has chosen. Is Allāh better or what they associate with Him?"

targetTranslation: Is Allah...? (questioning if Allah is better)
ayahArabic: قُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَىٰٓ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ

ayahArabic: قُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَىٰٓ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Praise be to Allāh, and peace upon His servants whom He has chosen. Is Allāh better or what they associate with Him?"

targetTranslation: he created (subject of أَمَّنْ - 'who is it that')
ayahArabic: أَمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ حَدَآئِقَ ذَاتَ بَهْجَةٍ مَّا كَانَ لَكُمْ أَن تُنۢبِتُوا۟ شَجَرَهَآ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ يَعْدِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [More precisely], is He [not best] who created the heavens and the earth and sent down for you rain from the sky, causing to grow thereby gardens of joyful beauty which you could not [otherwise] have grown the trees thereof? Is there a deity with Allāh? [No], but they are a people who ascribe equals [to Him].

targetTranslation: water (object of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
ayahArabic: أَمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ حَدَآئِقَ ذَاتَ بَهْجَةٍ مَّا كَانَ لَكُمْ أَن تُنۢبِتُوا۟ شَجَرَهَآ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ يَعْدِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [More precisely], is He [not best] who created the heavens and the earth and sent down for you rain from the sky, causing to grow thereby gardens of joyful beauty which you could not [otherwise] have grown the trees thereof? Is there a deity with Allāh? [No], but they are a people who ascribe equals [to Him].

targetTranslation: they deviate/turn away (referring to those who associate partners with Allah)
ayahArabic: أَمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ حَدَآئِقَ ذَاتَ بَهْجَةٍ مَّا كَانَ لَكُمْ أَن تُنۢبِتُوا۟ شَجَرَهَآ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ يَعْدِلُونَ

Is there a deity with Allāh? [No], but they are a people who ascribe equals [to Him].

ayahArabic: أَمَّن جَعَلَ ٱلْأَرْضَ قَرَارًا وَجَعَلَ خِلٰلَهَآ أَنْهٰرًا وَجَعَلَ لَهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ حَاجِزًا أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who made the earth a stable ground and placed within it rivers and made for it firmly set mountains and placed between the two seas a barrier? Is there a deity with Allāh? [No], but most of them do not know.

targetTranslation: most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)
ayahArabic: أَمَّن جَعَلَ ٱلْأَرْضَ قَرَارًا وَجَعَلَ خِلٰلَهَآ أَنْهٰرًا وَجَعَلَ لَهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ حَاجِزًا أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

targetTranslation: they know (referring to the disbelievers mentioned as أَكْثَرُهُمْ in the ayah)
ayahArabic: أَمَّن جَعَلَ ٱلْأَرْضَ قَرَارًا وَجَعَلَ خِلٰلَهَآ أَنْهٰرًا وَجَعَلَ لَهَا رَوٰسِىَ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ حَاجِزًا أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

targetTranslation: he answers/responds (to الْمُضْطَرَّ - the distressed one)
ayahArabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allāh? Little do you remember.

ayahArabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allāh? Little do you remember.

targetTranslation: he called out to him (object of يُجِيبُ - responds to)
ayahArabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allāh? Little do you remember.

ayahArabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allāh? Little do you remember.

targetTranslation: is there a god? (questioning the existence of another deity besides اللَّهِ)
ayahArabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allāh? Little do you remember.

ayahArabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ

ayahArabic: أَمَّن يَهْدِيكُمْ فِى ظُلُمٰتِ ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ وَمَن يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦٓ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ تَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who guides you through the darknesses of the land and sea and who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy? Is there a deity with Allāh? High is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: أَمَّن يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَمَن يَرْزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهٰنَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who begins creation and then repeats it and who provides for you from the heaven and earth? Is there a deity with Allāh? Say, "Produce your proof, if you should be truthful."

targetTranslation: he returns/brings it back (object of يَبْدَؤُا)
