ayahArabic: أَمَّن يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَمَن يَرْزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِلٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهٰنَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Is He [not best] who begins creation and then repeats it and who provides for you from the heaven and earth? Is there a deity with Allāh? Say, "Produce your proof, if you should be truthful."

ayahArabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allāh, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."

targetTranslation: he knows (what is in the heavens and earth)
ayahArabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allāh, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."

ayahArabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allāh, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."

ayahArabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allāh, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."

targetTranslation: they perceive (referring to those in the heavens and earth)
ayahArabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allāh, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."

targetTranslation: when (asking about يُبْعَثُونَ - they will be resurrected)
ayahArabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allāh, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."

ayahArabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allāh, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."

targetTranslation: they caught up with each other
ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱدَّارَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّنْهَا بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind.

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱدَّارَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّنْهَا بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind.

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱدَّارَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّنْهَا بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind.

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱدَّارَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّنْهَا بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind.

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱدَّارَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّنْهَا بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind.

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱدَّارَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّنْهَا بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind.

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرٰبًا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]?

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرٰبًا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]?

targetTranslation: is it when? (questioning what كَفَرُوا say)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرٰبًا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]?

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرٰبًا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]?

targetTranslation: dust, soil (object of كُنَّا - we were)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرٰبًا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]?

targetTranslation: is it really that we? (expressing disbelief in being resurrected)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرٰبًا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]?

targetTranslation: we were promised (subject of this statement)
ayahArabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا هٰذَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples."

targetTranslation: we (as the subject of وُعِدْنَا - we were promised)
ayahArabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا هٰذَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples."

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا هٰذَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples."

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا هٰذَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples."

ayahArabic: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Proceed [i.e., travel] through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals."

targetTranslation: travel! (multiple people) (followed by فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ - in the earth)
ayahArabic: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Proceed [i.e., travel] through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals."

ayahArabic: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Proceed [i.e., travel] through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals."

ayahArabic: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Proceed [i.e., travel] through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals."

ayahArabic: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Proceed [i.e., travel] through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals."

ayahArabic: وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُن فِى ضَيْقٍ مِّمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire.

ayahArabic: وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُن فِى ضَيْقٍ مِّمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire.

ayahArabic: وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُن فِى ضَيْقٍ مِّمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire.

ayahArabic: وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُن فِى ضَيْقٍ مِّمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire.

targetTranslation: when (asking about time in وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ - and they say, "When?")
ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful?"

ayahArabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you [i.e., very near] - some of that for which you are impatient.

targetTranslation: perhaps/maybe (expressing hope about يَكُونَ - it will be)
ayahArabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you [i.e., very near] - some of that for which you are impatient.

ayahArabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you [i.e., very near] - some of that for which you are impatient.

targetTranslation: it followed closely (referring to the punishment they were rushing for)
ayahArabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you [i.e., very near] - some of that for which you are impatient.

targetTranslation: some/part of (subject of يَكُونَ - to be)
ayahArabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you [i.e., very near] - some of that for which you are impatient.

ayahArabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you [i.e., very near] - some of that for which you are impatient.

ayahArabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you [i.e., very near] - some of that for which you are impatient.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord is the possessor of bounty for the people, but most of them are not grateful."

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord is the possessor of bounty for the people, but most of them are not grateful."

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord is the possessor of bounty for the people, but most of them are not grateful."

targetTranslation: they thank/are thanking (referring to most people in ٱلنَّاسِ)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord is the possessor of bounty for the people, but most of them are not grateful."

targetTranslation: your Lord (being acted upon by إِنَّ)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمْ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare.

targetTranslation: that which (object of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمْ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمْ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمْ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare.

targetTranslation: they make public (referring to what the disbelievers conceal and reveal in صُدُورُهُمْ)
ayahArabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمْ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare.

ayahArabic: وَمَا مِنْ غَآئِبَةٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا فِى كِتٰبٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register.

ayahArabic: وَمَا مِنْ غَآئِبَةٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا فِى كِتٰبٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register.

ayahArabic: وَمَا مِنْ غَآئِبَةٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا فِى كِتٰبٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this Qur’ān relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this Qur’ān relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree.

targetTranslation: Israel (meaning: Servant of Allah) - name of Prophet Jacob (peace be upon him)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this Qur’ān relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this Qur’ān relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this Qur’ān relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree.

targetTranslation: they/them (referring to the Children of Israel who disagree)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this Qur’ān relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this Qur’ān relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقْضِى بَيْنَهُم بِحُكْمِهِۦ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them by His [wise] judgement. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقْضِى بَيْنَهُم بِحُكْمِهِۦ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them by His [wise] judgement. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقْضِى بَيْنَهُم بِحُكْمِهِۦ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them by His [wise] judgement. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

ayahArabic: فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِنَّكَ عَلَى ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلْمُبِينِ
ayahEnglish: So rely upon Allāh; indeed, you are upon the clear truth.

ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating.

ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating.

ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating.

targetTranslation: they turned away intensively (from the truth/guidance)
ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating.

targetTranslation: those who turn back (describes their state when they turned away in وَلَّوْا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلٰلَتِهِمْ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [i.e., submitting to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلٰلَتِهِمْ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [i.e., submitting to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلٰلَتِهِمْ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [i.e., submitting to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلٰلَتِهِمْ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [i.e., submitting to Allāh].

targetTranslation: he believes/has faith (in آيَاتِنَا - our signs)
ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلٰلَتِهِمْ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [i.e., submitting to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلٰلَتِهِمْ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [i.e., submitting to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when the word [i.e., decree] befalls them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, [saying] that the people were, of Our verses, not certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when the word [i.e., decree] befalls them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, [saying] that the people were, of Our verses, not certain [in faith].

targetTranslation: a creature (object of أَخْرَجْنَا/We will bring forth)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when the word [i.e., decree] befalls them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, [saying] that the people were, of Our verses, not certain [in faith].

targetTranslation: she speaks to them (referring to دَآبَّةً, the creature)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when the word [i.e., decree] befalls them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, [saying] that the people were, of Our verses, not certain [in faith].

targetTranslation: they were (referring to those who disbelieve in the signs mentioned in تُكَلِّمُهُمْ)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when the word [i.e., decree] befalls them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, [saying] that the people were, of Our verses, not certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when the word [i.e., decree] befalls them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, [saying] that the people were, of Our verses, not certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ فَوْجًا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ فَوْجًا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ فَوْجًا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ فَوْجًا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ فَوْجًا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows

targetTranslation: they are being gathered (refers to those who deny Our signs)
ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ فَوْجًا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing?"

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing?"

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing?"

targetTranslation: Did you all deny/reject? (speaking to Allah's signs in this ayah)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing?"

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing?"

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing?"

targetTranslation: you all were (speaking to a group)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing?"

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing?"

ayahArabic: وَوَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِم بِمَا ظَلَمُوا۟ فَهُمْ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the decree will befall them for the wrong they did, and they will not [be able to] speak.

ayahArabic: وَوَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِم بِمَا ظَلَمُوا۟ فَهُمْ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the decree will befall them for the wrong they did, and they will not [be able to] speak.

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.

targetTranslation: they see/saw (after أَلَمْ meaning 'did they not')
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوْهُ دٰخِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allāh wills. And all will come to Him humbled.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوْهُ دٰخِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allāh wills. And all will come to Him humbled.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوْهُ دٰخِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allāh wills. And all will come to Him humbled.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوْهُ دٰخِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allāh wills. And all will come to Him humbled.

targetTranslation: Allah (as the doer of the action)

targetTranslation: those who are humbled (object of أَتَوْهُ - they came to Him)
ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوْهُ دٰخِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allāh wills. And all will come to Him humbled.

targetTranslation: you consider them (the mountains) (while you see them)
ayahArabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ تَحْسَبُهَا جَامِدَةً وَهِىَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِ صُنْعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَتْقَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you see the mountains, thinking them motionless, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allāh, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Aware of that which you do.

ayahArabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ تَحْسَبُهَا جَامِدَةً وَهِىَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِ صُنْعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَتْقَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you see the mountains, thinking them motionless, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allāh, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Aware of that which you do.

targetTranslation: it passes by (referring to الْجِبَالَ - the mountains)
ayahArabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ تَحْسَبُهَا جَامِدَةً وَهِىَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِ صُنْعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَتْقَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you see the mountains, thinking them motionless, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allāh, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Aware of that which you do.

ayahArabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ تَحْسَبُهَا جَامِدَةً وَهِىَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِ صُنْعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَتْقَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَفْعَلُونَ

ayahEnglish: And you see the mountains, thinking them motionless, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allāh, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Aware of that which you do.

targetTranslation: you (all) do/make/act (referring to what Allah is aware of)
ayahArabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ تَحْسَبُهَا جَامِدَةً وَهِىَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِ صُنْعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَتْقَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you see the mountains, thinking them motionless, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allāh, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Aware of that which you do.

targetTranslation: whoever (does جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ - comes with good)
ayahArabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٍ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Whoever comes [at Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it, and they, from the terror of that Day, will be safe.

ayahArabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٍ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Whoever comes [at Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it, and they, from the terror of that Day, will be safe.

ayahArabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٍ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Whoever comes [at Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it, and they, from the terror of that Day, will be safe.

ayahArabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٍ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Whoever comes [at Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it, and they, from the terror of that Day, will be safe.

targetTranslation: on that day (when the good deed is done)
ayahArabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٍ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Whoever comes [at Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it, and they, from the terror of that Day, will be safe.

ayahArabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٍ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Whoever comes [at Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it, and they, from the terror of that Day, will be safe.

ayahArabic: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do?"

ayahArabic: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do?"

ayahArabic: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do?"

ayahArabic: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do?"

ayahArabic: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do?"

targetTranslation: you (all) work/do (referring to what was done in the Fire)
ayahArabic: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do?"

targetTranslation: I was ordered (connected to أَنْ أَكُونَ - that I be)
ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Say, O Muḥammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [i.e., those who submit to Allāh].

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Say, O Muḥammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [i.e., those who submit to Allāh].

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Say, O Muḥammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [i.e., those who submit to Allāh].

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Say, O Muḥammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [i.e., those who submit to Allāh].

targetTranslation: he made it completely forbidden (referring to الْبَلْدَةِ - the city)
ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Say, O Muḥammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [i.e., those who submit to Allāh].

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Say, O Muḥammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [i.e., those who submit to Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَأَنْ أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهْتَدِى لِنَفْسِهِۦ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to recite the Qur’ān." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners."

ayahArabic: وَأَنْ أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهْتَدِى لِنَفْسِهِۦ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to recite the Qur’ān." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners."

ayahArabic: وَأَنْ أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهْتَدِى لِنَفْسِهِۦ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to recite the Qur’ān." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners."

ayahArabic: وَأَنْ أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهْتَدِى لِنَفْسِهِۦ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to recite the Qur’ān." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners."

ayahArabic: وَأَنْ أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهْتَدِى لِنَفْسِهِۦ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to recite the Qur’ān." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners."

ayahArabic: وَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ فَتَعْرِفُونَهَا وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And say, "[All] praise is [due] to Allāh. He will show you His signs, and you will recognize them. And your Lord is not unaware of what you do."

ayahArabic: وَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ فَتَعْرِفُونَهَا وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And say, "[All] praise is [due] to Allāh. He will show you His signs, and you will recognize them. And your Lord is not unaware of what you do."

targetTranslation: you (plural) do/act/work (in response to سَيُرِيكُمْ - He will show you)
ayahArabic: وَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ فَتَعْرِفُونَهَا وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
